HackerRank.Login Issue: Please check your HackerRank username/password or reset your password.
HackerRank.Submission Issue: Check input/output format and ensure your code compiles correctly on the HackerRank IDE.
HackerRank.Test Case Issue: Verify edge cases and constraints in your solution. Hidden test cases often check for performance.
HackerRank.General Issue: Please provide more details about your HackerRank issue.

AI Tools.Login Issue: Please ensure you are using the correct Single Sign-On (SSO) credentials for the AI Tool.
AI Tools.API Error: Check your API key. Ensure you haven't exceeded rate limits or check the service status page.
AI Tools.General Issue: Please provide more details about the AI Tool issue.

Payments.Login Issue: Please ensure you are securely logged into your payment portal.
Payments.Transaction Failed: Check if your card is valid and has sufficient balance. If money was deducted, it will be refunded automatically within 24 hours.
Payments.Refund Issue: Refunds take 5-7 business days to reflect in your account. Please check your bank statement.
Payments.General Issue: Please provide your transaction ID for further assistance.

Unknown Domain.Login Issue: Please specify the platform you are trying to access.
Unknown Domain.Submission Issue: Please specify where you are submitting your code.
Unknown Domain.Test Case Issue: Please specify the platform for the test cases.
Unknown Domain.API Error: Please provide the endpoint and the platform you are integrating with.
Unknown Domain.Transaction Failed: Please provide your transaction ID and the payment platform.
Unknown Domain.General Issue: Please provide more details about your issue and the platform involved.
